impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving legal obligations, UI hints, user facts, document requirements, fee notices, and deadlines stay distinct and cannot enter guardrail extraction without citations and explicit review-needed state.
summary: Add deterministic requirement-boundary fixture validation for separate PP&D requirement classes and fail-closed citation/review flags.
target_task: Task checkbox-104: Task checkbox-99: Add validation for requirement-boundary fixtures proving legal obligations, operational UI hints, user facts, document requirements, fee notices, and deadlines are classified separately and fail closed when citations or review-needed flags are missing.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
